title: cyclobalanus induta
intro: Cyclobalanus induta, also known as the Japanese Sweet Chestnut or Japanese Chestnut, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Japan. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cyclobalanus induta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health. The plant's bark and leaves are often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
